title: Send a chat message with a selected model
description: A signed-in user can choose a model, send a prompt, and receive a streamed reply in chat.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open chat
Select an available AI model
Fill in the message field with a chat prompt
Send the message
Verify the sent message appears in the conversation
Verify a streamed AI reply is displayed

title: Login with email and password
description: An authenticated member can sign in with email and password and reach the protected app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the authenticated experience is displayed
Verify access to the protected app is granted

title: Send a prompt and receive a streamed reply
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can select a model, send a chat prompt, and see a streamed assistant response in the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Select an available model
Fill in the chat prompt field with Hello, summarize the app
Send the chat message
Verify the user message appears in the conversation
Verify a streamed assistant response is displayed

title: Login with Google account
description: An authenticated member can complete Google sign-in and reach the protected app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Choose Google sign-in
Complete the authentication flow
Verify the authenticated experience is displayed
Verify access to the protected app is granted

title: Open chat after signing in
description: A signed-in user can open the chat experience from the protected app and see the message composer.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open chat
Verify the chat interface is displayed
Verify the message composer is available

title: Respect model and mode entitlements in chat
description: Verifies that a subscriber can use entitled reasoning or deep research modes while locked options remain unavailable in chat.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Select a higher-tier available model
Enable the reasoning mode
Enable the deep research mode
Verify locked models or modes are not available for selection
Send the chat message
Verify the enabled advanced modes are reflected in the conversation state
Verify the assistant reply is displayed

title: View subscription tiers and redeem a voucher
description: A user can review pricing options, redeem a valid voucher, and see upgraded access reflected in the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open pricing
Enter a valid voucher code
Redeem the voucher
Verify the subscription access is updated
Verify an updated billing entry is visible

title: Use reasoning mode in chat
description: A subscriber can enable reasoning mode for a supported model and get a response in the chat thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open chat
Select an available AI model
Enable reasoning mode
Fill in the message field with a reasoning prompt
Send the message
Verify the reasoning-enabled conversation is displayed
Verify a response is displayed

title: View pricing tiers and redeem a voucher
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can open pricing, review subscription tiers, and redeem a valid voucher to see the account upgrade reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /pricing
Review the available subscription tiers
Fill in a valid voucher code into the voucher field
Redeem the voucher
Verify the subscription upgrade is reflected on the page
Verify voucher redemption activity is displayed

title: Use deep research mode in chat
description: A subscriber can enable deep research for a supported model and receive a detailed reply.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open chat
Select an available AI model
Enable deep research mode
Fill in the message field with a research question
Send the message
Verify the deep research conversation is displayed
Verify a detailed response is displayed

title: See locked model gating in chat
description: A free-tier user can identify that a locked model requires a higher subscription tier and return to choosing another model.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open chat
Select a locked AI model
Verify a higher-tier access message is displayed
Verify model selection remains available

title: Review billing balance, tier, and history
description: An authenticated admin or support viewer can open billing and review the wallet balance, active tier, and transaction history.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open billing
Verify the wallet balance is displayed
Verify the active subscription tier and transaction history are displayed

title: Review wallet balance and active tier
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can open billing and view the wallet balance, active subscription tier, and transaction history.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /billing
Verify the wallet balance is displayed
Verify the active subscription tier is displayed
Verify the transaction history log is displayed

title: Edit display name and avatar URL in settings
description: An authenticated user can update profile details in settings and see the saved profile reflected in the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open settings
Fill in the display name field with a new profile name
Fill in the avatar URL field with a valid image URL
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile is displayed
Verify the saved profile changes are reflected in the app

title: Update profile details successfully
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can change their display name and avatar URL and see the updated profile reflected in settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings
Fill in the display name field with Apex Member
Fill in the avatar URL field with a valid URL
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile details are displayed

title: Review redeemed vouchers and tier changes
description: Verifies that billing history shows previously redeemed vouchers along with credited amounts and subscription tier changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /billing
Verify redeemed voucher activity is displayed in the billing history
Verify credited amounts or tier change details are displayed

title: Show empty chat state before a conversation starts
description: Verifies that a signed-in user sees the empty chat state before sending any messages and can begin a conversation from it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Verify an empty chat state is displayed
Fill in the chat prompt field with Start a new conversation
Send the chat message
Verify the conversation begins with the new message

title: Show validation for missing login credentials
description: A guest sees validation feedback when trying to sign in without providing the required credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the sign-in form without entering credentials
Verify validation feedback is displayed
Verify the authenticated experience is not displayed

title: Show validation for an invalid voucher code
description: A user sees voucher validation feedback when redeeming an invalid code on the pricing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open pricing
Enter an invalid voucher code
Redeem the voucher
Verify voucher validation feedback is displayed
Verify subscription access is not updated

title: Show validation for empty profile fields
description: An authenticated user sees validation feedback when trying to save invalid empty profile values in settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open settings
Clear the display name field
Clear the avatar URL field
Save the profile changes
Verify validation feedback is displayed
Verify the profile is not updated

title: Reject empty profile values
description: Verifies that saving invalid or empty profile values shows validation feedback and does not apply the changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings
Clear the display name field
Clear the avatar URL field
Save the profile changes
Verify profile validation feedback is displayed
Verify the profile changes are not applied

title: Reject an invalid voucher code
description: Verifies that entering an invalid voucher code on pricing shows validation feedback and does not apply a subscription change.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /pricing
Fill in an invalid voucher code into the voucher field
Redeem the voucher
Verify voucher validation feedback is displayed
Verify the subscription remains unchanged
